hero.subtitle: Open framework for AI governance. Registry, risk classification, assessments, human oversight, and incident management — mapped to EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and ISO 42001.
hero.login: Already have an account? Log in
social.title: Trusted by
value.label: Why AI Sentinel
value.v1.title: Full AI Registry
value.v1.desc: Maintain a living inventory of every AI system, model, and agent across your organization — from draft through deployment to retirement.
value.v2.title: Guided Risk Classification
value.v2.desc: Apply the EU AI Act four-tier risk framework with a step-by-step Annex III wizard and maintain a full classification audit trail.
value.v3.title: Structured Assessments
value.v3.desc: Run FRIAs, Conformity Assessments, AI Risk evaluations, and Bias & Fairness reviews with guided templates and approval workflows.
value.v4.title: Three Frameworks, One Matrix
value.v4.desc: Map controls against EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and ISO 42001 simultaneously. Export compliance matrices for audits.
workflow.label: How it works
workflow.s1.title: Register your AI systems
workflow.s1.desc: Add every AI system, model, and data source to your living inventory with lifecycle tracking.
workflow.s2.title: Classify risk levels
workflow.s2.desc: Use the guided Annex III wizard to assign EU AI Act risk tiers with automatic scoring.
workflow.s3.title: Run impact assessments
workflow.s3.desc: Complete FRIAs, conformity checks, and bias evaluations using structured templates.
workflow.s4.title: Set up human oversight
workflow.s4.desc: Define approval gates at every stage — pre-deploy, post-deploy, periodic review, and incident-triggered.
workflow.s5.title: Track incidents & comply
workflow.s5.desc: Log AI incidents with severity assessment, response timelines, and Art. 73 notification workflows.
feat.label: Core Capabilities
feat.registry.title: AI Registry
feat.registry.headline: Know every AI system you operate.
feat.registry.desc: Maintain a living inventory of every AI system, model, and agent. Track lifecycle stages and assign roles under the EU AI Act.
feat.risk.title: Risk Classification
feat.risk.headline: Classify risk before you deploy.
feat.risk.desc: Apply the EU AI Act four-tier risk framework with a guided Annex III wizard and full classification history.
feat.oversight.title: Human Oversight
feat.oversight.headline: Humans in the loop, by design.
feat.oversight.desc: Define approval gates at every stage. Log every human decision with full context for Art. 14 compliance.
feat.incidents.title: Incident Tracking
feat.incidents.headline: From detection to authority notification.
feat.incidents.desc: Log AI-specific incidents — hallucinations, bias, drift, adversarial attacks — with severity assessment and Art. 73 workflows.
cta.text: Start governing your AI systems today. Free to use, open source, and built for startups navigating the EU AI Act.
